name: Network Share Added to a Compromised Host
notes: This rule triggers when a network share has been added to a compromised host.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001528) Network Share Object Added
when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
TD_list: APPLY Network Share Added to a Compromised Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001528) Network Share Object Added
AND when any of Source IP are contained in any of Compromised Hosts - IP
RED_list: Event name: A Network Share Has Been Added In a Compromised Host
Event description: A Network Share Has Been Added In a Compromised Host
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
